mapper.select: select ra.* from rbac_resource ra inner join rbac_role_authority rra on ra.id = rra.authority_id inner join rbac_role rr on rr.id = rra.role_id inner join rbac_user_role rur on rur.user_id = rr.id where ra.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and rr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and rur.user_id = #{userId} and ra.resource_code is not null and rra.authority_type = '1'
